payload.answer: Memory recorded: target URL fetch failed with 404 for https://example.com/missing; no content retrieved. Useful for memory architecture as a pointer that external fetch can fail and should be treated as missing resource. Ambiguity preserved: no alternate article content captured.

entity_resolution.reason: URL fetch returned 404; no article content retrieved; treat as missing resource

details: Recorded failure for URL https://example.com/missing with 404 status.
